summary: An index of World Labs blog posts outlining Dr. Fei-Fei Li's vision for 'spatial intelligence.' The brief blurbs introduce her belief that AI must evolve to perceive, reason, and act in 3D space to truly understand the physical world.

principles.statement: Spatial intelligence is AI's next frontier.
principles.rationale: To truly understand and interact with the physical world, AI systems must be able to perceive, reason about, and act within 3D space.

mental_models.name: From Words to Worlds (Spatial Intelligence)
mental_models.description: The lens that AI's evolution must transition from processing text ('words') to generating and understanding 3D spatial environments ('worlds') in order to unlock embodied intelligence and human progress.
